query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph showing a man's face in profile looking toward the right, with an overlapping reflection of what appears to be a street scene including buildings and a sloped roof structure. Fine scratch-like marks traverse the surface of the image. The man has dark, styled hair and wears a dark collared shirt. The background contains indistinct architectural elements and cloudy sky visible through the layered imagery.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph with double exposure effect showing a man's face in profile looking toward the right, overlaid with a translucent reflection of a street scene including buildings and a sloped roof structure. Fine scratch-like marks traverse the surface of the image, and the layered transparency creates ghosted architectural forms across the man's features and hair. The man has dark, styled hair and wears a dark collared shirt. The background contains indistinct architectural elements and cloudy sky visible through the deliberate overlapping exposures.
